How rotation works

💡 The idea: Instead of paying for every service every month, you rotate through them. You might have Netflix in January, Max in February, and Hulu in March — catching up on shows as you go.

🔧 How to use this tool: Toggle services on, adjust the slider to match what you actually pay per month, then use the schedule on the right to see your year planned out.

📅 Pro tip: Click any month in the schedule to add specific shows you want to watch that month. This helps you plan exactly which service to have active and when.

12-month rotation — tap a month to plan it
